summary: First-finish smoke test of Bharat Trade Agent. Backend healthcheck, market overview, quote (RELIANCE.NS), holdings CRUD, watchlist CRUD, and AI recommendations (POST + latest) all returned 200 with expected fields. Frontend UI: dashboard loads, market ticker + summary render, Add Holding dialog works, RELIANCE holding appears with live LTP ₹1304, invested ₹25000, P/L -₹11960 (-47.84%), watchlist add (ITC) works with live price, Generate Insights populates all 3 AI sections + portfolio-health, delete holding removes row.
passed: GET /api/holdings -> enriched with current_price, pnl, day_change; summary aggregated
POST/GET/DELETE /api/watchlist -> ITC enriched with live price ₹289.95
POST /api/ai/recommendations -> returned safe_exits/new_buys/long_term_picks with live-price enrichment (ICICIBANK, BHARTIARTL, LT, SUNPHARMA, NTPC)
Frontend: Add Holding dialog flow works end-to-end
Frontend: Watchlist add (ITC) shows live price/change
Frontend: Generate Insights populates section-exits, section-buys, section-longterm, portfolio-health
Frontend: Delete holding removes row and updates summary
notes: AI call took ~20-30s as expected. yfinance returned non-zero live quotes. No console errors observed during core flow. test_credentials.md not applicable (no auth).
